title: bellium rotundifolium
intro: Bellium rotundifolium, also known as Round-leaved Bellwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Bellium rotundifolium include its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to relieve digestive problems and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and has also been used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to support its medicinal properties.
